query:
SELECT t.name, ts.scheduledAt, ts.durationMin, ts.status, LEFT(ts.focus, 60) AS focus
FROM tutorSessions ts JOIN tutors t ON t.id = ts.tutorId
WHERE ts.scheduledAt BETWEEN '2026-05-04' AND '2026-05-15'
ORDER BY ts.scheduledAt;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT t.name, ts.scheduledAt, ts.durationMin, ts.status, LEFT(ts.focus, 60) AS focus
FROM tutorSessions ts JOIN tutors t ON t.id = ts.tutorId
WHERE ts.scheduledAt BETWEEN '2026-05-04' AND '2026-05-15'
ORDER BY ts.scheduledAt;
